name: property managers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate tracking of utility expenses causes cash flow gaps. We automate expense reporting instead of manual spreadsheets and inconsistent billing data.
problem_solved: Inaccurate tracking of utility expenses leading to cash flow gaps.
features: manual data entry for utility bills
